heading: Mantuan Downs vs Manumbar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mantuan Downs, Queensland and Manumbar, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mantuan Downs and Manumbar have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Mantuan Downs or Manumbar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mantuan Downs has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Manumbar scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mantuan Downs scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Manumbar scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mantuan Downs or Manumbar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mantuan Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
